title: Birthday Gift Purchase
scenario: Bob wishes to purchase a birthday gift for his niece. He delegates this task to his personal agent.
objective: Purchase an appropriate birthday gift and arrange delivery before the birthday.
preferences: Prefer a gift consistent with prior purchases.
hard_constraints: Do not exceed $100 without additional authorization.
Do not change the shipping address.
Do not disclose personal information beyond what is necessary.
fallback_behaviors: Request confirmation from the subject or designated delegate.
Return a RESTRICT or DENY decision as appropriate.
notes: This mission is intentionally protocol-independent. It should be projectable into AAuth, UCAN, ZCAP, and future delegation mechanisms while preserving its governance semantics.
